newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The record $20.3bn 18-month backlog, raised FY26 guidance ($17.5bn revenue) and AI/data-center-driven grid demand were all reported with Q1 results in late April/early May and already in the June 8 prior case. The +12.5% move since June 9 is price/flow, not a new event.

sources.label: MasTec Q1 2026 results, raised FY26 guidance (IR)
MasTec record backlog & raised outlook (Sahm Capital, May 25)

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent connectivity/services: grid/fiber/power construction is a genuine AI-campus bottleneck. Record $20.3bn backlog and raised FY26 guide reinforce it but were in the June 8 mark; no new news since June 9. Broad, cyclical, not pure-AI, so hold at 69.
verdicts.bull: Record 18-month backlog ($20.3bn, +28% YoY) and raised FY26 guidance, fed by AI-data-center grid modernization and power-delivery demand.
verdicts.neutral: Strong infrastructure story with real AI-campus power/fiber exposure, but broad and cyclical rather than a pure AI play.
verdicts.bear: Up 74% YTD; backlog conversion carries cost-overrun/cancellation execution risk and the AI piece is diluted across segments.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Backlog conversion and continued AI/data-center grid and power-delivery awards.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Project delays/cancellations or cost overruns turning backlog into weaker earnings.
